notes: Full counter-service menu captured from Marination Ma Kai. Protein choices are modifiers, not standalone dishes; mapped to the dishes they serve. Happy Hour pricing noted where distinct. No bottle list present.

dishes.name: Taco 2-Pack
dishes.description: Choice of protein (kalua pork, kalbi beef, miso ginger chicken, spicy pork, or sexy tofu) in corn tortillas with signature slaw, Nunya sauce, homemade pickled jalapeños, sesame seeds.
dishes.price_note: Kalbi beef add $0.50. Happy Hour weekdays 2–5PM: $7.

dishes.name: Slider 2-Pack
dishes.description: Choose SPAM or kalua pork on a Hawaiian-style sweet roll with Nunya sauce and signature slaw.

dishes.name: Katsu Slider 2-Pack
dishes.description: Katsu-style sliders. Happy Hour special item.
dishes.price_note: Happy Hour weekdays 2–5PM: $7; regular price not listed.

dishes.name: Lū'au Plate
dishes.description: Choice of protein served with signature slaw, mac salad, white rice, and a Hawaiian-style sweet roll.

dishes.name: Taco Salad
dishes.description: Choice of protein with signature slaw, Nunya sauce, and all the fixings of a taco except the tortillas.

dishes.name: Kimchi Fried Rice
dishes.description: Kimchi fried rice topped with a sunny-up egg, green onions, and furikake. Add protein for +$3.

dishes.name: Pork Katsu Sandwich
dishes.description: Pork cutlet with panko crust on ciabatta with mayo, 'Bulldog' sauce, red onions, and tangy slaw.

dishes.name: Chicken Katsu Sandwich
dishes.description: Chicken cutlet with panko crust on ciabatta with mayo, 'Bulldog' sauce, red onions, and tangy slaw.

dishes.name: Korean Cheesesteak
dishes.description: Kalbi beef with grilled kimchi, onion, jalapeño, melted cheese, mayo on a Macrina demi-baguette.

dishes.name: Kimchi Quesadilla
dishes.description: Flour tortilla with kimchi, cheese, Korean-style crema, chopped slaw, and homemade pickled jalapeños. Add kalua pork for +$1.

dishes.name: Loco Moco
dishes.description: Beef patty with brown gravy over white rice topped with two sunny-up eggs.

dishes.name: Spicy Pork Torta
dishes.description: Spicy pork on a Macrina demi-baguette with holla and Nunya sauce, slaw, hibiscus pickled peppers, and onion.

dishes.name: Aloha Tots
dishes.description: Tater tots topped with kalua pork, kimchi sauce, mayo, scallions, and a fried egg.

dishes.name: Hangover Tots
dishes.description: Kalua pork over handcut fries with brown gravy, cheddar, scallions, and a sunny-up egg.

dishes.name: Spam Musubi
dishes.description: Classic Hawaiian SPAM musubi.

dishes.name: Miso Caesar Salad
dishes.description: Miso Caesar salad. Add protein for +$6, add katsu pork or chicken for +$7.
dishes.price_note: Add protein +$6; add katsu pork or chicken +$7.

dishes.name: Mac Salad
dishes.description: Hawaiian-style macaroni salad.

dishes.name: Signature Slaw
dishes.description: House signature slaw.

dishes.name: Tots
dishes.description: Tater tots.

dishes.name: Kid's Cheese Quesadilla
dishes.description: Kids' cheese quesadilla.

dishes.name: Kid's Protein & Rice
dishes.description: Kids' choice of protein served with rice.

dishes.name: Malasada — Plain
dishes.description: Classic Hawaiian fried dough malasada.

dishes.name: Malasada with Filling
dishes.description: Hawaiian malasada filled with a sweet filling.
